'''zhorakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keglike|keglike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keglike|keglike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhorakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhorakithi|zhorakithi]] || [[word:zhorakiji|zhorakiji]] || [[word:zhorakishi|zhorakishi]] || [[word:zhorakiki|zhorakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhorakuthuthu|zhorakuthuthu]] || [[word:zhorakujuju|zhorakujuju]] || [[word:zhorakushushu|zhorakushushu]] || [[word:zhorakukuku|zhorakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhorakuthu|zhorakuthu]] || [[word:zhorakuju|zhorakuju]] || [[word:zhorakushu|zhorakushu]] || [[word:zhorakuku|zhorakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhorakufthuf|zhorakufthuf]] || [[word:zhorakufjuf|zhorakufjuf]] || [[word:zhorakufshuf|zhorakufshuf]] || [[word:zhorakufkuf|zhorakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhorakethe|zhorakethe]] || [[word:zhorakeje|zhorakeje]] || [[word:zhorakeshe|zhorakeshe]] || [[word:zhorakeke|zhorakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhorakothotho|zhorakothotho]] || [[word:zhorakojojo|zhorakojojo]] || [[word:zhorakoshosho|zhorakoshosho]] || [[word:zhorakokoko|zhorakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhorakotho|zhorakotho]] || [[word:zhorakojo|zhorakojo]] || [[word:zhorakosho|zhorakosho]] || [[word:zhorakoko|zhorakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhorakofthof|zhorakofthof]] || [[word:zhorakofjof|zhorakofjof]] || [[word:zhorakofshof|zhorakofshof]] || [[word:zhorakofkof|zhorakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhorakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhorakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhorakĂŠthĂŠ|zhorakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhorakĂŠjĂŠ|zhorakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhorakĂŠshĂŠ|zhorakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhorakĂŠkĂŠ|zhorakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhorakathatha|zhorakathatha]] || [[word:zhorakajaja|zhorakajaja]] || [[word:zhorakashasha|zhorakashasha]] || [[word:zhorakakaka|zhorakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhorakatha|zhorakatha]] || [[word:zhorakaja|zhorakaja]] || [[word:zhorakasha|zhorakasha]] || [[word:zhorakaka|zhorakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhorakafthaf|zhorakafthaf]] || [[word:zhorakafjaf|zhorakafjaf]] || [[word:zhorakafshaf|zhorakafshaf]] || [[word:zhorakafkaf|zhorakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhorakasha|zhorakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhorakshĂ«asha|zhorakshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhorakroasha|zhorakroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhorakmuasha|zhorakmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhorakyaasha|zhorakyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoraknkshĂ«asha|gozhoraknkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoraknkroasha|gozhoraknkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoraknkmuasha|gozhoraknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoraknkyaasha|gozhoraknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhorarakasha|zhorarakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhorarakshĂ«asha|zhorarakshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhorarakroasha|zhorarakroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhorarakmuasha|zhorarakmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhorarakyaasha|zhorarakyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoraraknkshĂ«asha|gozhoraraknkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoraraknkroasha|gozhoraraknkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoraraknkmuasha|gozhoraraknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoraraknkyaasha|gozhoraraknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zherĂŠkasha|zherĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zherĂŠkshĂ«asha|zherĂŠkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zherĂŠkroasha|zherĂŠkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zherĂŠkmuasha|zherĂŠkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zherĂŠkyaasha|zherĂŠkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozherĂŠknkshĂ«asha|gozherĂŠknkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozherĂŠknkroasha|gozherĂŠknkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozherĂŠknkmuasha|gozherĂŠknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozherĂŠknkyaasha|gozherĂŠknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhorfakasha|zhorfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhorfakshĂ«asha|zhorfakshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhorfakroasha|zhorfakroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhorfakmuasha|zhorfakmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhorfakyaasha|zhorfakyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhorfaknkshĂ«asha|gozhorfaknkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhorfaknkroasha|gozhorfaknkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhorfaknkmuasha|gozhorfaknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhorfaknkyaasha|gozhorfaknkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
